title: gymnanthemum fimbrilliferum
intro: Gymnanthemum fimbrilliferum, also known as African blue basil or African blue tea, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum fimbrilliferum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Gymnanthemum fimbrilliferum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
